query:
SELECT n.id, n.title, n.fileName, n.fileUrl, n.createdAt 
FROM orgNotes n
JOIN organizations o ON o.id = n.organizationId
WHERE o.slug = 'RMCA'
ORDER BY n.createdAt DESC;
